title: Brenda Funk
compiled_truth: Brenda Funk is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-05-22), Brenda Funk sent 6 and received 66 emails, totalling 72 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (6), [Joel Ephross](people/joel-ephross) (2), [Carol Clair](people/carol-clair) (1), [Mcfam](people/mcfam-andrews-kurth) (1), [Barbd](people/barbd-andrews-kurth) (1).
